assertions.reason: Swap widget card is visible with You pay/You receive rows, token selectors, direction toggle, and green Connect Wallet CTA.
Swap and Limit tabs are both present; switching to Limit shows buy/sell controls with price+amount inputs and switching back restores Swap inputs.
Both input rows expose token selector buttons with icon+ticker labels (e.g., CASH, USDC) and they are clickable.
Token selector modal opens with search and token list (CASH/USDC), and selecting USDC updates the input and closes modal, but per-token user balances are not shown in the modal.
Clicking the direction toggle swaps from/to token positions (USDC↔CASH) as expected.
No expandable price-details section is visible; no exchange-rate, price-impact, or minimum-received fields were found in the swap card.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions for swap-selector group-core using agent-browser: 4 passed (VAL-SWAP-001/002/003/006) and 2 failed (VAL-SWAP-004 missing visible balances in modal, VAL-SWAP-010 missing expandable price details section).
